info.title: sillydoom
info.author: sewerfilth
info.description: A Doom launcher proof of concept
info.details:
Title Image generated using AI for convenience.

Place WAD in switch/ named DOOM1.WAD 
This has only been tested with DOOM v1.9 using the ID Software 1.10 Engine authorized under GPL.
https://github.com/id-Software/DOOM

SillyDoom is a modern wrapper for the ID Doom engine using a custom framework written specifically to take advantage of the switch architecture. The engine is running deterministically fully on the GPU with minimal CPU orchestration. No game data is included.

changelog: Initial Release\n- Audio Should be handled \n- WAD Loading externally instead of embedded filesystem
